entries.source:
Chat Edit: 'Implement the MASM integration - Wire up the decompression calls in GGUFLoaderQt::inflateWeight() to support custom compressed models
Add monitoring/logging - Instrument the model loading pipeline with observability per the AI Toolkit production readiness guidelines
Test model loading - Create test cases to verify models load with various quantization types
Something else - Let me know what's needed
What would be most valuable for your development at this point?'
